notes: Wave 12 Track C candidate (remaining international UN days).
Date and history (UNGA Resolution 40/212, adopted 17 Dec 1985; 2001 declared International Year of Volunteers via resolution 52/17 of 1997) confirmed via WebSearch against un.org/unv.org.

Gulf relevance confirmed: Saudi Arabia's Ministry of Human Resources and Social Development runs 'Saudi Volunteering Day' on the same date under the slogan 'عطاء وطن', tied to Vision 2030 nonprofit-sector goals (spa.gov.sa, hrsd.gov.sa); UAE also observes it nationally (aletihad.ae, alkhaleej.ae).

Competitor check: spa.gov.sa/aletihad.ae/alkhaleej.ae are seasonal news pieces not evergreen reference pages, belarabyapps.com is general educational content without the precise UN resolution number or a countdown — none unify the UN day and the Saudi/UAE national observances into one reference page.
countryScope: all (shared international day, generates per-country alias pages).
